scope: Fail-closed staged result snapshot with owned pixel buffers, process progress, summary, selection, terminal errors and explicit release.

rejected: Worker buffer aliasing: completion clones every RGBA ArrayBuffer before exposing staged output.
Summary drift: output count, pixel count and warning union are checked against the cloned outputs.
Progress regression: stage index, ratio and completed counters cannot move backwards.
Selection escape: selected output indices are bounded to the staged set.
Memory retention: disposal zeroes owned buffers and returns an idle snapshot without URLs or Blobs.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: The model is feature-local and ephemeral; process orchestration/UI are G6-02 and durable commit is G6-03.
